results.title: PURPLE STYLE LABS | DEBT FUNDING — Sales Pitch (English)
results.content:
Headline: India's Luxury Boom Play — 45% Gross Margins, Zero Listed Competition, Pre-IPO Lock at 6.4x Revenue

Elevator: Purple Style Labs owns Pernia's Pop-Up Shop — India's #1 omni-channel luxury fashion destination, scaling 11x from FY21 to FY24 and targeting ₹1,600 Cr by FY29. This NCD offers 12-month fixed-income exposure to a monopolistic platform riding India's fastest-growing luxury segment — projected to hit $85–90 Bn by 2030 — with a marquee cap table (Binny Bansal, Bajaj Holdings, Utpal Sheth-RARE), imminent 12–18 month IPO, and breakeven-to-double-digit EBITDA inflection already underway.

Ideal Client: ₹50L–5Cr ticket HNI / family office with 12–24 month horizon, appetite for structured credit in high-growth private cos, seeking pre-IPO exposure with downside protection and comfort in consumption-led India themes.

results.title: Aditya Birla Structured  Opportunities Fund Series 2 · ABSL Structured Opportunities Fund Series II_Deck.pdf
results.content:
ignificant capex for downstream value addition.
• Project being funded in Debt to Equity mix of 3:1; Senior debt has been sanctioned
• At the time of transaction, ~50% of equity was pumped in; funding sought for part of balance equity portion
• Debt backed by charge over Borrower assets
• Also secured by exclusive pledge & CG of group company (owns property valued at 3.0x debt amount)
• Tenor: 48 months, with Put/ Call option of 36 months
• Stipulated Security Cover: 2.5x; actual cover considering Issuer & guarantor assets is > 3.0x
• Amortizing structure; quarterly servicing from cashflows
Exit Strategy
• Even at peak borrowings, Company likely to have net debt to EBITDA of less than 3.0x
• Can be comfortably serviced through operating cash flows of Borrower over 3- 4 years and part refinance.
Investment – Rs 79 Cr || IRR – 15.6%
30
